title: Divine Intervention
description: When your health drops low, images of Jesus will flash on your screen and church bells will toll, reminding you to keep fighting and never give up.
body:
# Divine Intervention

Description:

Experience a divine touch in your Minecraft adventures with the Divine Intervention mod! When your health drops low, images of Jesus will flash on your screen and church bells will toll, reminding you to keep fighting and never give up. Whether you're battling fierce mobs or surviving in harsh conditions, this mod adds a unique, spiritual element to your gameplay.

Features:
- Divine Alerts: When your health is critically low, uplifting images of Jesus will momentarily appear on your screen.
- Holy Sounds: Hear the soothing chime of church bells as a reminder to stay strong in the face of danger.

Bring a bit of faith into your Minecraft world with the Divine Intervention mod. Perfect for players seeking a spiritual touch in their gameplay!

> Note: This mod is meant to add a bit of fun and inspiration to your game. It is designed with respect for all players and is suitable for all ages.

[CurseForge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/divine-intervention)

Download now and experience the divine intervention in your Minecraft adventures!
